question: For all the products sold for more than 3 times, list their id and description.
sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_description FROM Products p JOIN Order_Items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) > 3;

back_translation.intent: 查找具有超过3个订单项的产品信息

semantic.reason: 过滤条件中的COUNT统计的是订单项数量而非订单数量，可能导致与原始问题中'销售超过3次'的语义不一致
